subcodes.title: Words to Mr and Mrs Hannen, spoken on 1909-02-22
subcodes.first_line: We are gazing upon Mt Carmel, where many kings and world conquerors had come... Bravo! Very Good! It is not the personality at which we should look
subcodes.subjects: @oneness or innumerability of the Manifestations of God, @Manifestation of God as sun, @symbolism, @Shrines and Holy places
